summary: Tested all 4 paywall scenarios for the LawFlow app. All scenarios pass correctly. Paywall check is properly placed BEFORE form navigation (not at form submit).

scenarios_tested.scenario_1: PASS - Free user at 10 cases → tap New Case (+) → PaywallSheet ('Unlimited Cases is a Pro feature') appears immediately. /cases/new form does NOT open.
scenarios_tested.scenario_2: PASS - Free user with 0 cases → tap New Case (+) → /cases/new form opens directly. No PaywallSheet.
scenarios_tested.scenario_3: PASS - Pro user → tap New Case (+) → /cases/new opens. Tap New Client (+) → /clients/new opens. No PaywallSheet in either case.
scenarios_tested.scenario_4: PASS - Free user at 10 clients → tap New Client (+) → PaywallSheet ('Unlimited Clients is a Pro feature') appears immediately. /clients/new form does NOT open.

critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and correct. handleNewCase/handleNewClient gates navigation before pushing route.
PaywallSheet uses correct featureName ('Unlimited Cases' vs 'Unlimited Clients') per tab.
clients/[id].tsx handleNewCase also correctly checks allCases.length >= 10 before navigating.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted 10 test cases (TEST_ prefix) and 10 test clients (TEST_ prefix) for paywall limit testing. Plan restored to pro after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paywall gate is fully working. Free plan users hit PaywallSheet at >= 10 cases or clients before any form navigation. Pro users bypass paywall entirely.
